data.name: Anal club
data.detailed_description:
The first rule of Anal Club is that no one talks about Anal Club.

The second rule of Anal Club is that no one talks about Anal Club. We insist. Unless you're telling a girl who enjoys anal sex.

The third rule of Anal Club is that there must be no more than one guy in the room. The number of women doesn't matter.

The fourth rule of Anal Club is that sex ends when you've fucked a girl's ass and come inside it.

The fifth rule of Anal Club is that you can't leave if you've only fucked one ass that night.

The sixth rule of Anal Club is that erotic clothing is allowed in the rooms, but nothing that covers the parts we all want to see.

The seventh rule of Anal Club is that each sexual encounter ends when all participants want it to. Only then will the room's door open, and you can leave.

And the eighth and final rule of Anal Club is that if it's your first night at Anal Club, you have to fuck three asses.

Sayuri, pure elegance

Boss and manager. Good friend. Dominant. Ass lover.

Kaori, the innocent one

New to Anal Club. Shy and insecure. Eager to please. Easily falls in love.

Emi, the sweet one

Feels like she's known you forever. Submissive. Totally submissive. Likes being punished. Enjoys a spanking now and then.

Haruka, the most energetic

Founding member of Anal Club. Always smiling. Always in the mood. Always makes you laugh.

Mei, the tender one

Founding member of Anal Club. Cheerful, submissive, and kind, but also a beast in bed.

Miyu, the mysterious one

Little is known about Miyu. She doesn't talk much, and it's hard to spot her around the club. She's someone who makes you wait and desire, wait and desire…

FEATURES

  • Visual Novel++ Format: Each girl has different story arcs that complete her own narrative.

  • No Censorship!: We've removed censorship from the images (we’ll add an option later to censor them as preferred).

  • Gallery: Fill an image album as you progress through the story and revisit the chapters you've completed.

  • Choose the Girl: Decide which girl to pursue as the story unfolds.

  • Flashback: Go back in the story at any time to change a decision or relive a moment.

  • Smooth Navigation: Choose whether text progresses automatically or skip it to reach your favorite part.

  • Immersive Audio: Including music, sound effects, voices, and "other effects." Adjust volume settings independently or mute everything.

PLEASE NOTE

  • All characters depicted and visually represented in this game are over 18 years old, and no real or identifiable minors were used in the production of this game.

  • Help us out! If you think you can improve the narrative in your language, feel free to send us your suggestions via email or message us on our Steam page.

  • We're still working on it: All updates and improvements we develop will be added to the game at no additional cost.

data.short_description: Asses. Cute asses. Big, juicy asses. By the dozens. Do you want to fuck them all? There's a perfect place for that: Anal Club. But the first rule of Anal Club is you do not talk about Anal Club…
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間
